items.title: 2/19: The Takeout with Major Garrett
items.description: Former Prince Andrew arrested over revelations in Epstein files; U.S. women's hockey team wins gold after victory over Canada.

items.title: See where homeowners pay the highest property taxes by county and state
items.description: The median property tax bill in the U.S. soared 30% between 2019 and 2024, compounding the financial pressures on millions of Americans.

items.title: Eric Dane, "Grey's Anatomy" star diagnosed with ALS, dies at 53
items.description: In April 2025, Eric Dane announced he had been diagnosed​ with amyotrophic lateral sclerosis, or ALS.

items.title: 2/3: The Takeout with Major Garrett
items.description: President Trump signs bill ending partial government shutdown; Mr. Trump says Republicans should "nationalize" elections.
